The next Princess Connect card you play this turn costs 2 less to play.

[Union Burst] On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. Deal each other enemy follower on the field 1 damage. -------- On Super Evolve - Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field.

[Union Burst] [fanfare] - Search your deck for an amulet, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. ---------- [act] Engage an amulet on your field: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
